use_cases: Primary action triggers in authentication forms like reset password flows
Interactive controls in SaaS dashboard interfaces
Call-to-action buttons in e-commerce checkout flows
Form submission buttons in healthcare patient portals
Navigation and action buttons in dev-tools interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built with Radix UI's Slot for composition pattern and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Supports standard accessibility features including focus-visible states, disabled states, and keyboard navigation. Forms part of a reset password form system but can be used independently across any application requiring form controls.
